name: Low Fat Caesar Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 loaf of Italian bread, cut into 3/4-inch cubes
1 garlic clove, minced and mashed into a paste with 1/4 teaspoon salt
1 head romaine, rinsed, spun dry, and cut into wide strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, toss bread cubes with 1 teaspoon of olive oil. Arrange on a sheet pan in a single layer and bake for 10 minutes, or until golden. Remove from oven and cool.
3. In a medium bowl, whisk together the stock, anchovy paste, lemon juice, vinegar, mustard, worcestershire sauce, and garlic paste. Slowly whisk in the remaining olive oil in a steady stream. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Cover and chill for up to 2 days.
4. Divide romaine among 4 bowls and drizzle dressing over salads. Sprinkle each salad with 1 tablespoon red onion, the Parmesan cheese, and croutons. Serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
